audioClips.transcript: Welcome aboard flight 305 to Cairo. Please make sure your seatbelts are fastened and your tray tables are in the upright position. We will be taking off shortly.
audioClips.question: Who is speaking?

audioClips.transcript: Good morning. I've completed the pre-flight check on the engines and the landing gear. Everything is secure and ready for departure.
audioClips.question: Who is speaking?

audioClips.transcript: Hello, this is the captain speaking from the flight deck. We are now cruising at an altitude of 35,000 feet. The weather ahead is clear and we expect to land on schedule.
audioClips.question: Who is speaking?
